object.name: BotSubscriptionUpdated
object.description: This object contains information about changes to a user payment subscription toward the current bot.
object.html_description: This object contains information about changes to a user payment subscription toward the current bot.
object.rst_description: This object contains information about changes to a user payment subscription toward the current bot.

annotations.description: User who subscribed for payments toward the bot
annotations.html_description: User who subscribed for payments toward the bot
annotations.rst_description: User who subscribed for payments toward the bot
annotations.name: user

annotations.description: The new state of the subscription. Currently, it can be one of 'canceled' if the user canceled the subscription, 'active' if the user re-enabled a previously canceled subscription, or 'failed' if payment for the subscription failed.
annotations.html_description: The new state of the subscription. Currently, it can be one of “canceled” if the user canceled the subscription, “active” if the user re-enabled a previously canceled subscription, or “failed” if payment for the subscription failed.
annotations.rst_description: The new state of the subscription. Currently, it can be one of 'canceled' if the user canceled the subscription, 'active' if the user re-enabled a previously canceled subscription, or 'failed' if payment for the subscription failed.
annotations.name: state
